frontier_observations.observation: Incomplete-node exploration produced strong yield and likely benefited from richer host/service context.
untested_edge was underrepresented in the engagement, so conclusions about its yield are weak.
inferred_edge produced 81% apparent yield across 16 observed follow-ups.

context_gaps.gap: 2 service nodes lack banner, version, or protocol enrichment.
context_gaps.recommendation: Improve service parsing so Claude gets richer service context instead of making decisions from bare open ports.

context_gaps.gap: 1 history entries indicate failures or access denial, which may mean validation warnings were too weak or too generic.
context_gaps.recommendation: Strengthen validate_action guidance for recurring failure patterns so Claude gets clearer pre-execution context.

context_gaps.gap: Structured activity logging is not strong enough to support high-confidence iterative improvements.
context_gaps.recommendation: Prioritize instrumentation: record action_id, event_type, frontier_type, and explicit result linkage for key actions before relying heavily on retrospective guidance.

issues: Only 0% of history entries include a frontier type.
About 100% of retrospective judgments depend on text heuristics.
logging_quality.recommendation: Prioritize instrumentation: record action_id, event_type, frontier_type, and explicit result linkage for key actions before relying heavily on retrospective guidance.

recommendations: Improve service parsing so frontier reasoning includes richer service details.
